title: Partner/need outreach + verified-need decision log
context: verifiedNeed is false across this project until a sarcoma-research partner or >=3 documented researcher requests are secured (PLAN section 2/11). This task logs outreach contacts and records a documented verified-need decision. Binding cancer guardrails (PLAN section 7): open-access/aggregate/de-identified metadata only; no controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA) or patient-identifiable data; COSMIC/OncoKB reference-only (not ingested); provenance on every assertion; links only, no omics/sequence/image payloads re-hosted; no medical advice. No partner/requestor secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Conduct partner/need outreach and produce a decision log of >=3 documented contacts plus an explicit verifiedNeed determination.
acceptanceCriteria: >=3 outreach contacts logged with date, channel, and outcome; no contact fabricated.
Documented verifiedNeed decision recorded (remains false until a partner or >=3 researcher requests are confirmed).
Candidate partners from PLAN section 11 referenced; steward review recorded.
output: review/partner-outreach-log.md capturing contacts and the verified-need decision.
